description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by lush landscaping, featuring a flat roof and clean geometric lines. The structure is primarily composed of light gray and white materials, with large windows and multiple entryways visible from different sides. The front of the property includes a paved driveway with parked cars and a manicured lawn, while the backyard features a pool and patio area. Mature trees and shrubs provide privacy and shade around the perimeter. The building appears to be single-story, with a spacious open-plan layout and outdoor living spaces. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped surroundings, including a driveway, pool, and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, manicured lawn, and several parked cars.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, side entrance, and a glimpse of the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, patio, and privacy fencing with mature trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, side yard, and additional landscaping.
